title: Addon adda for chestshop
description: this is a plugin which act as a addon to add itemdisplay above chest for the plugin named chestshop by phoenix616
body:
## Addon Description: Holographic Item Display for ChestShop
This addon enhances the shopping experience in Minecraft by adding a holographic display(itemdisplay) above each shop created with the ChestShop plugin by Phoenix616. This addon is compatible with Minecraft version 1.20+ and utilizes the new itemdisplay feature introduced in 1.19.4 version. (example can be seen in gallery.)

## Features
- Chestshop item logo
- Per shop total transaction limit
- Discord alerts
- Per rank shop creation limit

## Installation
- Download from Modrith
- Put in plugins folder 
- Restart. Thats all

## Dependency
- ChestShop plugin by Phoenix616

## Command
- /adda reload

## Todos
- Gui shop search
- Item click shop creation

## Disclaimer
If need any help join discord, the Chestshop plugin is not mine so any bug related to it will not be fixed by me, this plugin is only a addon for it which will be maintained by me only if there is enough attention.

<details>
  
<summary>Default config</summary>  
  
```
  
itemdisplay:
  enable: true
#Distance to view the logox y and z size of the item above chest
  size: [0.5f,0.5f,0.5f]
#Distance to view the logo
  view: 10
#hight of the item from ground
  hight: 1.5
#item name
  name: '&b%item% x%size%'
  
  
moneylimit:
  enable: true
#reset the players limit after 24h or server restart
  reset_every: 24 
#admin shop name
  admin_name: 'Admin Shop'
#per admin shop total transaction limit
  buy_admin_shop: 100
  sell_admin_shop: 100
#per player shop total transaction limit
  buy_player_shop: 999999999999
  sell_player_shop: 999999999999
  message:
    cancel: '&cYou can only shop %amount% more from this shop'

limit:
  enable: true
  default: 5
  vip: 10
  message:
    reached: '&cShop creation Limit Reached!! for %rank%'
  
discord:
  enable: false
  url: 'https://discord.com/api/webhooks/blaablaablaa'
  
```    

</details>
